## ABOUT RAWSTONE VEHICLE HIRE LTD

Rawstone Vehicle Hire Ltd provide self-drive hire services to our clients in Sevenoaks, Edenbridge and surrounding locations. We are a well-established, family-owned business and have been serving our customers for over 25 years. Our team is proud to supply our clients with the latest vehicles, that are all ULEZ compliant. We aim to exceed the expectations of every customer with our variety of cars, vans, and minibuses for hire. Whether you’re moving home or moving out of an office space, we have the perfect vehicles to help with your removals. Please get in touch with us today for more information.

​

Important Information:

There is a £20 holding fee for new clients to secure the booking.

Please note at the time of hire we require to see your driving licence, NI number and proof of address, no more than 6 points and no driving bans within the last 5 years. Drivers must be between 23-75 and hold a full licence for at least 2 years.

[Vehicle Hire](https://www.rawstonevehiclehireltd.co.uk/vehicle-hire)

''Great service, great price. From the initial phone call, through checking the van was big enough for what we needed, to the price the service from Rawstone was superb. The Luton Van we hired was very clean and the perfect size for our needs. Highly recommended.''
